headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Martin Marietta Materials, Raises Price Target to $804
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) with a Buy and raises the price target from $780 to $804.
